description: Chat with a local LM Studio model right inside a CodeTerm pane. An open agent shell: native LM Studio v1 streaming, presets, visible system prompt, and CodeTerm tool execution.
configHelp: LM Studio turns a CodeTerm pane into an open agent shell. It uses LM Studio native v1 endpoints: POST /api/v1/chat for stateful streaming chat and GET /api/v1/models for model discovery. To use it: in LM Studio load a model and Developer tab → Start Server (defaults to http://localhost:1234). Knobs (set with `codeterm plugin config lmstudio --set key=value` or edit config.yaml): `baseUrl` — server base URL; `model` — fallback model id; `maxToolRounds` — per-turn tool-call cap (1-64, default 8); `responseFormat` — structured-output response_format object passed to LM Studio; `defaultPreset` — fallback preset id; `presets` — array of {id,name,systemPrompt?,model?,params?}. A preset with `model` binds to that exact model id and is selected before an explicit preset request; preset params may override `maxToolRounds` and `responseFormat`.
